note: seq=53 (DEPLOY /brain -- the self-learning autonomous memory, ADDITIVE, PG-safe, no lifeline restart). Installs the stdlib-only brain package under /opt/atlas/brain and its data root at /var/lib/brain via /opt/atlas/brain_install.py: extracts the sha-pinned tarball (as-is; the package has brain/ at top level -- NOT strip-components, which would flatten the package and break -m brain), runs `brain init` then `brain seed` (starts smart with the real project lessons incl. the SEV-1 'never scale the enrich pool past PG-safe ~1,200/min' roadbump), creates the /var/lib/brain/logs/inbox.jsonl FILE BRIDGE (the writers' channel) seeding one atlas_outcome + one deploy_roadbump demo event on first install, then drain -> reflect -> stats and publishes status/hetzner/brain-stats.json. Installs the nightly `brain reflect` timer (03:30) so it consolidates wins/mistakes/roadbumps every night. WIRING: the ATLAS outcome loop and the deploy pipe write wins/mistakes/roadbumps as JSON lines into logs/inbox.jsonl; the reflect timer drains them -- no import coupling, survives lang/env mismatch (per INTEGRATION_PLAN). VERIFIED LOCALLY this session: init/seed/drain(applied 2)/reflect(reinforced 16, insights 2)/stats all pass, and decide('scale the enrich pool to go faster') returns the SEV-1 lesson at confidence 100. Touches NO prod service; the puller restore-point + health-check wrap it. Allowlist-safe (/opt/atlas/ + systemctl).

steps.note: seq=53: deploy /brain self-learning memory to /opt/atlas/brain + /var/lib/brain; nightly reflect; inbox.jsonl bridge.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/brain-system.tar.gz':'fc935fe54bb9619d8b91356cd923761ed675dd793510a0866a15bc3cc4a9ed0c','/opt/atlas/brain_install.py':'712b9aee4479782c26e0f5630a7812bc422dee035d4598189bafd861134dc986'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=brain reflect -- nightly self-learning consolidation (drain + reflect)
After=network.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Environment=BRAIN_ROOT=/var/lib/brain
WorkingDirectory=/opt/atlas/brain
ExecStart=/bin/sh -c "/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -m brain drain --root /var/lib/brain && /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -m brain reflect --root /var/lib/brain"
TimeoutStartSec=600

[Unit]
Description=Run brain reflect nightly at 03:30

[Timer]
OnCalendar=*-*-* 03:30:00
Persistent=true
RandomizedDelaySec=300

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target
